title: Replacement Head for Philips Norelco S3000 S3103 S3206 S3202 S3203 S3102 S4303 Razor Blade，Not Applicable for Serie 3000 5D
features: Multi-layer blade design: Each layer works closely together, lifting the beard first and then cutting it in turn, penetrating deep into the root of the hair follicle, greatly improving the shave, and achieving excellent results with a single shave.

Fits the facial contour: The floating blade can be flexibly rotated in multiple directions, and the 360° omnidirectional floating blade can swing up and down 30° and tilt left and right 15°, closely fitting the jaw, Adam's apple, philtrum depression and other complex parts, shaving without dead ends.
Convenient cleaning: The cutter head is easy to disassemble, and some also support one-button pop-up design, which can be quickly disassembled without tools and rinsed directly under the faucet.
Strong durability: The entire blade head is made of high-quality materials, the blade is resistant to wear, and the knife mesh is strong and not easy to deform.
Good waterproof performance: It can be used safely when bathing, and the blade head can be rinsed directly after use, without fear of water splashing, which is convenient and practical.
description: Product description Dear Buyers, Welcome to my store! I specialize in electrical accessories and spare parts, and am committed to providing you with practical products that meet your electrical repair and upgrade needs. We offer a wide variety of electrical accessories, and while we strive to get as many products on the shelves as possible, many still don't arrive on time. That doesn't mean we can't meet your needs. If you don't find a specific accessory or part for your appliance in our store, please leave a message to our customer service. We'll find what you're looking for. Restore, update, or upgrade your device. If you have any questions or needs, please leave a message to our customer service, and we will do our best to provide you with a satisfactory solution. I hope all this brings you some joy. Happy shopping! We look forward to seeing you there! Easy to install Please make sure your razor model is correct Applicable Model: series 3000 Partial models: S3103 S3206 S3202 S3203 S3103 S3102 S4303 S4301S1103 series Partial models:S1103 S1102 S1101 S1203 S2303 S2103 S2302 etc. Replacement blade *1 Cleaning brush*1 ========== Hign-concerned Chemical : None Material : PP plastic+stainless steel Item Type : Razor blade Safety Warning Warning: Never immerse the entire device in water. Use with caution when charging. Keep away from excessive heat. Do not use if the power cord is damaged. Keep out of reach of children. Handle the replacement blades with care.
